jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at T.I.M.E.
jsonLd.description:
Join the T.I.M.E. family as a Instructional Designer in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About T.I.M.E.:
T.I.M.E. is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with T.I.M.E.!
